w20: Accelerator-optimized instance featuring eight NVIDIA A100 GPUs and high-capacity memory for demanding machine learning and large-scale AI model training workloads.
c150: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 vCPUs, and 1360GB RAM for intensive AI workloads.
c200: The Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized instance equipped with 8 NVIDIA A100 80GB GPUs, 96 vCPUs, and 1360GB RAM, designed for high-demand machine learning and AI model training.
w150: The Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server built on an x86_64 architecture using Intel Xeon processors. It provides 96 vCPUs across 48 physical cores with a 2.2 GHz clock speed and 1360 GB of RAM. The configuration includes 8 NVIDIA A100 Ampere GPUs offering a total of 640 GB of VRAM, complemented by 3000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance and top-tier LLM inference capabilities, particularly for prompt processing and text generation across various model sizes. While single-core performance metrics are lower, the system excels in parallelized tasks. This server is engineered for compute-intensive operations, including large-scale machine learning model training, complex data science jobs, and high-throughput AI inference applications where GPU acceleration is critical for performance efficiency.
